Kampot trip / 17-19 July

Kampot Trip

A two-night route for a late arrival, one proper coast-and-pepper-farm ride, and a soft final cafe morning.

E-booking bus: $5.70/person Base: Montagne Boutique Day 2 ride: about 125-140 km
View itinerary Open Google route
01Route 02Photos MapOpen route

Route rhythm

Arrive, ride, wander.

Day 1

Arrive late

17 Jul / 7:00 PM-11:30 PM

7:00 PM

E-booking bus to Kampot

Leave Phnom Penh by bus, arrive in Kampot around 10:00 PM, then continue to Montagne Boutique for check-in.

Phnom Penh to Kampot: ~150 km | ~3-3.5 hrs | 7:00 PM-10:00 PM

10:00 PM

Montagne Boutique

Arrive, check into the Mountain View Twin Room, drop bags, and get ready for a simple night out.

From Kampot bus arrival area to Montagne Boutique: ~3-5 km | ~10-15 min

10:45 PM

Monkey Republic or late food

Go for night food or a relaxed bar stop. If you are tired, rest for the big ride.

From Montagne Boutique: ~3-4 km | ~10-15 min

Day 2

Exploring Kampot

18 Jul / 8:00 AM-9:30 PM

8:00 AM

Romantic168 motorbike rent

Pick up the bike first, then start the breakfast and cafe route.

From Montagne Boutique: ~3-4 km | ~10-15 min

8:25 AM

Num Tom Bakery

Grab bread before breakfast.

From Romantic168: ~2 km | ~6 min

8:45 AM

Breakfast near ZTO Express

Eat properly, fill water, and settle the route before cafe hopping.

From Num Tom Bakery: ~1-2 km | ~5 min

9:30 AM

Salt by Espresso

First coffee stop. Keep it easy so the ride to Kep stays on time.

From breakfast near ZTO: ~2 km | ~6 min

10:15 AM

Tranquil Cafe

Second cafe stop, quieter mood, still short enough to protect the day.

From Salt by Espresso: ~2 km | ~6 min

11:10 AM

Led Zep Mountain Cafe in Kep

Start the Kep side of the route. Kampot to Kep is about 25 km.

From Tranquil Cafe: ~25-28 km | ~35-45 min

12:15 PM

The Wave

Quick coastal stop for photos and sea air before Coconut Beach.

From Led Zep Mountain Cafe: ~4-6 km | ~10-15 min

12:45 PM

Coconut Beach and lunch

Walk, take photos, eat around the coast, then head toward La Plantation.

From The Wave: ~3-5 km | ~8-12 min

2:30 PM

La Plantation pepper farm

The main afternoon anchor: pepper farm, photos, and a slow walk.

From Coconut Beach: ~20-24 km | ~30-40 min

4:15 PM

Chongcham Lomhae

Flexible nature stop. Shorten it if the road is slow or daylight is fading.

From La Plantation: ~18-25 km | ~30-45 min

6:30 PM

Kampot Pie cake stop

Grab cake before dinner if you still want something sweet after the countryside loop.

From Chongcham Lomhae: ~18-24 km | ~30-45 min

7:15 PM

Kdam Kampot Restaurant

Dinner stop for the evening before a slow walk through Kampot city.

From Kampot Pie: ~1-3 km | ~5-10 min

8:30 PM

Kampot city night walk

Walk around the riverside or city center after dinner for night views and a relaxed end to the main ride.

From Kdam Kampot Restaurant: ~1-3 km | ~5-10 min

9:30 PM

Back to Montagne Boutique

Return to the hotel and end the main riding day.

From Kampot city center to Montagne Boutique: ~3-5 km | ~10-15 min

Day 3

Flexible return

19 Jul / 9:00 AM-return

9:00 AM

Kampot Pie

Slow start after the big ride.

From Montagne Boutique: ~3-4 km | ~10-15 min

9:45 AM

Cai Coffee

One more cafe stop before photos.

From Kampot Pie: ~1-2 km | ~5 min

10:30 AM

La Java Bleue

Take the front-of-restaurant photo and keep moving.

From Cai Coffee: ~1 km | ~4 min

11:15 AM

Laundry Cafe Burger Bar

Lunch stop while it is open, before deciding how much extra time to use in the afternoon.

From La Java Bleue: ~1-2 km | ~5 min

12:45 PM

Starbuck Fishmarket

Coastal/market-style stop before choosing the return plan.

From Laundry Cafe Burger Bar: ~24-27 km | ~35-45 min

2:30 PM

Veranda Natural Resort

If the return is in the evening, use the extra time for a relaxed resort/cafe view instead of rushing back too early.

From Starbuck Fishmarket: ~4-7 km | ~10-15 min

3:30 PM

Return to Phnom Penh

Pick based on how tired you are, the weather, and whether you want one more Kampot night.

Option A: Train back at 4:15 PM

Same-day return. Royal Railway takes about 4h24m, arrives Phnom Penh at 20:39, from USD 10.

From Kep area to Kampot railway station: ~24-30 km | ~40-50 min

Option B: Cheaper night bus

E-booking bus is cheaper at $5.70 and can arrive in Phnom Penh in the morning, but this plan means staying in Kampot one more night.

From Kep area back to Kampot hotel/bus point: ~24-30 km | ~40-50 min

Photo list

Saved places.

Compact cards using the images you added. Each card still opens the place in Google Maps.
